common.speechNotSupported: Browser does not support Speech Recognition

app.workerTitle: Search the regulations first, then decide whether to speak with a lawyer.
app.workerBody: AI answers are reference only. Keep your original files and move to a lawyer when the case becomes specific.
app.lawyerTitle: Review the platform notice first, then prepare the lawyer workspace.
app.lawyerBody: Review the service boundary, keep your profile current, and manage active consultations with recorded retention controls.
app.lawyerAction: Browse lawyer profiles and service notes
workerNoticeItems: AI answers are not formal legal advice.
Keep original documents and timing records by yourself.
Use the cited regulations and a licensed lawyer for case-specific action.
lawyerNoticeItems: Confirm the service boundary before providing any legal service.
Direct calls and retention tools are now available; use recordings only within your service scope and retention policy.
Do not request unnecessary personal data outside the platform.
app.workerStatus: RAG answers, lawyer browsing, and wallet pages are available in this build.
app.lawyerStatus: You are viewing the lawyer-specific workspace and compliance flow.
app.modalBody: Before using this account to provide legal services, please review the service boundary and your professional obligations.
modalItems: Do not imply a formal representation relationship before the required steps are complete.
Handle confidentiality and personal-data processing according to applicable rules.
Recordings are retained with participant-only access. Do not export or share them outside the allowed process.
app.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance! Need {required} pts, have {balance} pts. Please top up first.

login.panelTitle: You do not have to face labor disputes alone. We protect your rights in a language you understand.
panelItems: Find a Taiwan lawyer who will speak up for you
Transparent case wallet and payment tracking
login.title: Login / Register
login.description: Sign in first. Language can be changed at any time from the menu.
login.phoneLoginHint: Use the phone number already bound to your account. Firebase Phone Auth and reCAPTCHA must be enabled for this domain.
login.phoneRegisterHint: Verify the phone number first, then create a new account directly from the SMS code.
login.phoneNumberHint: International format is supported directly. Taiwan mobile numbers may be entered as 09xxxxxxxx and will be normalized automatically.
login.phoneCodeRequired: Please enter the SMS verification code.
login.phoneNameRequired: Please enter your full name before registering with phone OTP.
login.phoneLoginSuccess: Phone verification complete. Logging you in now.
login.phoneRegisterSuccess: Phone verification complete. Your account is ready.
login.phoneSendFailed: Unable to send the SMS verification code.
login.phoneVerifyFailed: Unable to verify the SMS code.
login.phoneSecurityNote: Phone OTP uses Firebase reCAPTCHA verification. If you see unauthorized-domain, add the current domain to Firebase Authentication authorized domains.
login.emailVerificationSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox before logging in.
login.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your practice on LawBridge.
dashboard.noCalls: No consultations yet. Go online to start receiving calls.

lawyerList.workerSubtitle: Browse available lawyers. Choose by specialty, language, and rate.
lawyerList.noResult: No lawyers found matching your search.
workerNoticeItems: Charges begin when the lawyer accepts. Rate is per minute.
Calls are recorded for quality purposes.
This is not a formal representation relationship.
lawyerList.lawyerSubtitle: Manage your online status, profile, and certifications.
lawyerNoticeItems: You can go online/offline and edit your profile.
Direct calls, retained recordings, and post-call controls are available in this build.
Handle personal data according to applicable rules.
lawyerScopeItems: Profile management and online status toggle
lawyerList.onlineStatus: You are online and accepting calls.
lawyerList.offlineStatus: You are offline. Go online to receive calls.
lawyerList.noProfile: No profile yet. Create one to start accepting calls.
lawyerList.specialtiesPlaceholder: Labor contracts, Workplace injury, Foreign workers

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Review your balance, launch NewebPay top-ups, and track settlement status here.
wallet.convenienceHint: Generate a NewebPay convenience-store code and settle it offline within the expiry window.
wallet.cardHint: Redirect to NewebPay card checkout for immediate payment confirmation.
wallet.comingSoon: Payment integration is not finished yet. This page currently shows the planned structure only.
wallet.gatewayReadyHint: You can create a payment order and complete the top-up through the hosted checkout page.
wallet.gatewayPendingHint: Merchant credentials are not configured yet. The production-safe flow is ready, but checkout stays disabled until the application is approved.
wallet.paymentCreateFailed: Unable to create a payment order right now.
wallet.paymentProcessing: Payment order created. Complete the checkout flow and return to refresh the balance.
wallet.paymentPending: Payment is pending. Please finish the store-code or bank payment before the expiry time.
wallet.paymentSettled: Payment settled. Your wallet balance has been refreshed.
wallet.paymentFailed: Payment failed or was not completed.
wallet.authRequired: Please sign in again before creating a payment order.
wallet.invalidAmount: This amount is not available for top-up.
wallet.invalidPaymentMethod: This payment method is not available.

recordings.title: Recording retention
recordings.none: No retained recording for this consultation.
recordings.secureNotice: Only consultation participants can open or download signed recording links.
recordings.loadFailed: Unable to load recording metadata right now.
recordings.accessFailed: Unable to open the recording right now.

lawyerWallet.title: Earnings
lawyerWallet.subtitle: Track your consultation income, platform fees, and payouts.
lawyerWallet.noHistory: No transactions yet. Start accepting calls to earn points.
lawyerWallet.withdrawHint: Withdrawal to bank account is not yet available. Coming soon.

aiChat.title: RAG Legal AI
aiChat.subtitle: Ask first. Review concise source notes after the answer.
aiChat.placeholder: For example: Can an employer deduct salary without notice?
aiChat.disclaimer: AI answers are reference only. Please verify the original regulation or consult a licensed lawyer for real cases.
aiChat.welcome:
Try asking:

1. Can an employer deduct salary?
2. How is overtime calculated?
3. What should I do after a workplace injury?
aiChat.error: The retrieval request failed. Please try again.
aiChat.dailyLimitReached: Daily limit reached ({limit} queries). Upgrade to Pro for 100/day.

certificate.title: Upload Certificate
certificate.subtitle: Upload your practicing certificate or ID for verification.
certificate.failed: Verification failed. Please upload a clearer image.
certificate.placeholder: e.g. 台北律字第 123 號

profile.title: Profile
profile.hint: This page currently shows basic account information only.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading.
